calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jan-12-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance by either party, the Court ruled as follows: The Hearing on Defendant James Phelan's Claim of Exemption is ordered off calendar. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

[Order signed after hearing.]

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jan-02-2018 Continued To Jan-12-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Dave Marcolini, Esq., T:415.568.0742, specialy appearing for assignee/opposing party;
No other appearance.

Mr. Marcolini represented to the court that he is in possession of a settlement agreement signed by the claimant and requested that the hearing be continued for at least one week to give the parties sufficient time to finalize the settlement and file a dismissal. The court adopted the tentative ruling but deferred the signing of the order.

RULING: ASSIGNEE TK CREDIT RECOVERY'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of James Phelan - The Court grants judgment debtor James Phelan's claim of exemption. The SSI and retirement income earned by his wife as the sole household income is exempt under Code of Civ. Proc. 704.080(c). The Court shall sign the order on January 12, 2018 unless the Court receives a dismissal or settlement documentation that would obviate the order. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Continued To Jan-02-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

ASSIGNEE TK CREDIT RECOVERY DBA TK FINANCIAL's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Continued to January 2, 2018 at 9:30 AM in Department 302 per the agreement of the parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR No. 11185, e-mail: adelgado@sftc.org (L&M302)

Hearing On Judgment Debtor James Phelan'S Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dave Marcolini, Esq. (415-568-0742) special appearance for Plaintiff/Judgment Creditor
James Phelan (416-656-1994) Defendant/Judgmnet Debtor in Pro Per.


RULING - ARGUED. Hearing is held. Defendant argues debt is paid. PLaintiff argues 3 checks received but no record of debt being paid off. The Court looks at checks and documents in Open Court. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Judgment Debtor James Phelan'S Claim Of Exemption is Denied. The Sheriff is ordered to release 50% of the amount it is holding to the Judgment Creditor and 50% to the Judgement Debtor. Order is signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Marcolini, Esq. (415-528-0742) specially appearing for Plaintiff.
James Phelan (415-656-1994) for Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - The matter is discussed. The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

Judgment Debtor James Phelan's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is CONTINUED to July 19, 2017 at 9:30 AM in Department 302 per agreement of the parties to be heard by Judge Harold Kahn. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/SRB)

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-20-2017 Continued To Jul-11-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Marcolini, Esq. (415-568-0742) specially appearing for Plaintiff.
James Phelan (415-656-1994) for Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - The matter is discussed. Defendant submits additional paperwork in Open Court. The Court rules as follows: Judgment Debtor James Phelan's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is continued to July 11, 2017 at 9;30 am in Dept. 302 per stipulation of parties. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Continued To Jun-20-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. PHILIP T. KILDUFF, TEL. NO. 1-415-673-0368 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
JAMES PHELAN AND SHARON PHELAN, TEL. NO. 1-415-656-1994, DEFENDANTS APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING THE DEBT HAVING BEING PAID ALREADY. Defendant James Phelan's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is continued to June 20, 2017 for the defendants to research on the judgment and if there is an account number associated with the debt. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
